_note: Baked snapshot from the parent dataset (app/src/data/dungeons.json, Transporteur de Sylargh entry). Kept in sync manually so the hero demo never depends on a live fetch. Every bullet below must appear verbatim in the dataset for the 'zero hallucination' promise to hold.

bullets.text: Tuer les zombies rend Sylargh vulnérable 1 tour
Éviter d'être à 90%+ PV : risque d'état pacifique
Mort zombie tue instantanément les autres zombies proches
Zombie mort = explosion 1000 dégâts feu zone 5
Zombie death instakills all other zombies in 5-cell AoE
Stay below 90% HP or become pacifist when zombie dies
Dead monsters revive at 10% HP with +300 dmg buff for 1 turn
Kill all monsters at once to prevent chain revives
